name: Curry Mutton or Goat# 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the goat meat and cut it into pieces. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Add curry powder, scallion, onion, garlic, and hot pepper to the meat.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed in the meat.
4. Cover and let stand for 1 1/2 hours.
5. Heat oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
6. Add the marinated goat meat and seasonings to the pot.
7. Pour in lime juice and stir for five minutes.
8. Add 6 cups boiling water and bring to a simmer, covered.
9. Cook for 2-3 hours, stirring occasionally, until the meat is tender.
10. If needed, add more water to maintain the liquid level.
11. Stir in coconut milk, butter, sugar, and thyme.
12. Simmer for an additional five minutes.
13. Serve hot with plain white rice, roti, chutney, sliced beets, grated coconut, raisins, ripe banana, and sliced sweet peppers.
